structural_differences.summary: FIXED: Rust now mounts a single TkTestPanel as root, matching C++ standalone launcher
structural_differences.resolution: Removed TkTestGrpPanel, main() mounts TkTestPanel directly with Look::new()

structural_differences.summary: Group caption strings differ from C++

missing_groups.rust_status: emDialog not ported; group depends on dialog creation logic (Cycle callback)

missing_widgets_within_groups.summary: C++ has 6 check widgets, Rust has 4
C++ has 6 scalar fields, Rust has 3
cpp_has: sf4: Level, editable, range 1..5, value=3, TextOfLevelValue callback, textbox_tallness=0.25
sf5: Play Length, editable, range 0..86400000ms, value=4h, time scale marks, TextOfTimeValue callback
sf6: Play Position, editable, range 0..sf5.value, time scale marks, TextOfTimeValue callback
missing: sf4: Level field — requires TextOfValueFunc callback support
sf5: Play Length field — requires TextOfValueFunc callback + signal wiring
sf6: Play Position field — requires TextOfValueFunc callback + cross-field signal dependency

missing_widgets_within_groups.summary: C++ has 7 list boxes, Rust has 5
cpp_has: l7: Custom List Box (CustomListBox subclass), Multi-Selection, 7 items, selected_index=0
missing: l7: Custom List Box — requires CustomListBox/CustomItemPanel (recursive list)

configuration_differences.summary: C++ sets initial selections on list boxes; Rust does not
b2 'Long Desc' button missing long description text
FIXED: Text field captions now set via set_caption()
configuration_differences.resolution: Commit f31ccb9 added set_caption() calls for all text fields in test_toolkit.rs

configuration_differences.summary: C++ scalar field groups set PrefChildTallness(0.1); Rust does not
C++ color field groups set PrefChildTallness(0.4); Rust does not
FIXED: All groups now use set_border_scaling(2.5)
configuration_differences.resolution: Commit 76a844a set border_scaling=2.5 on TkTestPanel and all WidgetGroupPanels

configuration_differences.summary: C++ color fields have captions; Rust color fields have none
C++ scalar fields sf1/sf2 have captions; Rust scalar fields have none

missing_api_surface.description: emScalarField::SetTextOfValueFunc() — custom value-to-text callback for display
emScalarField::SetTextBoxTallness() — controls text box aspect ratio
Rust panels lack Cycle()/signal mechanism for cross-widget reactivity (sf5→sf6 dependency)
ListBox initial selection API — SetSelectedIndex and Select methods
emListBox::ItemPanelInterface for custom item panel rendering (recursive list boxes)
emTunnel widget type — ZUI tunnel with configurable depth and child tallness
Dialog and file selection infrastructure — not ported
emBorder caption/description system used by TextField, ScalarField, ColorField, Button. CONF-03 (TextField captions) resolved.
FIXED: set_border_scaling() already existed; now applied in test_toolkit.rs
emRasterGroup::SetPrefChildTallness() — controls preferred child aspect ratio. API exists (layout.preferred_child_tallness field); not yet set per-group in test_toolkit.rs.

visual_observations.summary: FIXED: Rust now shows a single TkTestPanel matching C++ layout
FIXED: TkTestPanel now uses RasterGroup with proper border chrome, background, and caption
visual_observations.resolution: Commit 76a844a replaced manual paint_rect with RasterGroup delegation

visual_observations.summary: FIXED: Root-level 'Toolkit Test' caption now rendered via RasterGroup border
FIXED: Radio Box items no longer render at dramatically smaller text size
FIXED: CheckButton now renders with raised 3D bevel appearance
FIXED: Group border proportions now correct with SetBorderScaling(2.5)
FIXED: Root uses pref_child_tallness=0.3; per-group tallness (CONF-04/05) still pending
visual_observations.resolution: Commit 76a844a set root pref_child_tallness=0.3. Child groups still use default 0.2.

visual_observations.summary: Row 3 has only List Boxes (col 1); cols 2-3 are empty
visual_observations.details: Rust 3-column grid: row 1 = Buttons/CheckWidgets/RadioWidgets, row 2 = TextFields/ScalarFields/ColorFields, row 3 = ListBoxes only. C++ row 3 would also contain Tunnels (col 2) and Test Dialog (col 3), with File Selection overflowing to row 4. The 2 empty cells are a direct consequence of the 3 missing groups (MISS-GRP-01..03).

visual_observations.summary: List boxes render as stacked single-column rectangles with tiny item labels on left edge
visual_observations.details: 5 list boxes visible: 1 empty (top), 4 with 7 items each. Items show as narrow rows with small text at the left margin. No visible selection highlighting on any items (see CONF-01: no initial selections set). C++ list boxes would show selected items highlighted and use raster layout for item arrangement.

visual_observations.summary: Scalar field sf3 (-1000..1000) shows scale marks with labeled endpoints and center, matching C++ behavior
visual_observations.details: The third scalar field clearly shows -1000, 0, 1000 labels with tick marks between them. The first two scalar fields (sf1, sf2) show slider handles but no visible scale marks (matching C++ default: no marks specified).

behavioral_bugs._systemic_hypothesis: RESOLVED (2026-03-18): All three systemic issues fixed — mouse hit-test dispatch, keyboard input routing, and layout stacking.

input_routing.summary: FIXED: Button click state machine now works correctly
FIXED: Long Desc button now depresses visually on click

input_routing.hierarchy: Check Buttons and Boxes > Check Boxes
input_routing.summary: FIXED: Check boxes now toggle correctly
FIXED: Radio buttons and boxes now activate correctly within their groups
FIXED: Read-only TextField now has grey background and cursor on click
FIXED: Keyboard input now routed to focused widget only
FIXED: Multi-line text now zooms proportionally with panel content
FIXED: Selection highlight now uses correct color per editable state and focus blend

rendering.hierarchy: Check Buttons and Boxes > Check Buttons
rendering.summary: FIXED: CheckButton now renders with raised 3D bevel appearance
FIXED: Group labels now visible above children
CLOSED: Code is identical to C++ — yellow tint (255,255,187) applied when activation_adherent is true. No code change needed.

layout.summary: FIXED: TkTestPanel now uses RasterGroup with pref_child_tallness=0.3, matching C++ auto-layout
layout.resolution: Commit 76a844a. Grid order now determined by RasterGroup algorithm instead of hardcoded 3-col manual layout.

layout.summary: FIXED: Children within groups now use multi-column raster grid layout
layout.resolution: Root cause was TkTestPanel giving groups tallness=0.8 via manual layout, making 1-column optimal for pref_ct=0.2. Replaced with RasterGroup (commit 76a844a) + border_scaling=2.5 so groups get landscape cells where multi-column is optimal.

interaction.summary: FIXED: ScalarField input used pixel-space content_rect but received normalized mouse coords. Now uses normalized (1.0, tallness) for content_rect in input handler. Also fixed Move returning true when not dragging.

FIXED: ColorFieldPanel now implements layout_children + auto_expand, wiring create_expansion_children() into the panel lifecycle. Expansion children (7 ScalarFields + 1 TextField) are created when ColorField is expanded.

FIXED: ListBox input handler used pixel-space content_rect Y but received normalized mouse Y. Now converts event.mouse_y to paint space (multiply by last_w) before index calculation. 5 list boxes interactable; 2 still missing (MISS-WID-04).

input_misdirection.summary: FIXED: Mouse hit-test dispatch and keyboard input routing both resolved.

stacking_instead_of_grid.summary: FIXED: Root cause was TkTestPanel manual layout giving groups tallness=0.8. Replaced with RasterGroup (pref_child_tallness=0.3, border_scaling=2.5). RasterLayout algorithm was correct all along.

label_occlusion.summary: FIXED: Group labels now visible. Border content rect correctly reserves caption space.
